messages.content: Build a tick emitter in RxJS v7 using interval that emits a typed Tick every 500 ms.
Build a one-shot delayed observable in RxJS v7 using timer that resolves after 2s with a typed payload.
What's the v7 way to turn a DOM click event target into a stream of typed click events? Show a minimal example.
Build an Observable<number> in RxJS v7 that emits the elements of a number array using from().
Explain briefly how `of()` differs from `from()` in RxJS v7, then show a typed example that uses each.
Build an HTTP GET stream in RxJS v7 using fromFetch that returns a typed User on success.
Explain the difference between Subject, BehaviorSubject, and ReplaySubject in RxJS v7, then show a typed example that picks the right one for a theme selector.
Build a notification bus in RxJS v7 using a plain Subject<Notice>. Late subscribers should NOT receive past notices.
What's the v7 way to expose a stateful counter that a late subscriber can read synchronously? Show a minimal example.
Build a recent-activity log in RxJS v7 using ReplaySubject so late subscribers receive the last 5 entries.
Write an RxJS v7 helper that exposes a read-only Observable<User> backed by a BehaviorSubject so consumers cannot call .next.
Build a build-complete signal in RxJS v7 using AsyncSubject that emits the final result only on completion.
What's the v7 way to share a single "final answer" to many consumers that may subscribe before or after it's known? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how AsyncSubject differs from BehaviorSubject in RxJS v7, then show a typed usage that makes the difference obvious.
Build a compile-result observable in RxJS v7 using AsyncSubject<CompileReport> with a typed next+complete pair.
Write an RxJS v7 AsyncSubject-backed helper that captures the final score of a match. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, consumers must not be able to call next.
Build a multicast cold HTTP source in RxJS v7 that caches the last response for new subscribers using shareReplay.
What's the v7 way to multicast a source so every subscriber sees the same live stream without re-subscribing the upstream? Show a minimal example with share().
Explain briefly how shareReplay's refCount option behaves in RxJS v7, then show a typed example that demonstrates it.
Build an RxJS v7 pipeline that multicasts an expensive mapping with share(), so many late subscribers don't re-run the work.
Build a custom Observable<number> in RxJS v7 using `new Observable(subscriber)` that emits 1, 2, 3 and completes.
What's the v7 way to wrap a setInterval in an Observable<number> so teardown clears the interval? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly why you should return a teardown from `new Observable` in RxJS v7, then show a typed example that wraps a WebSocket-like handle.
Build a typed Observable<MouseEvent> in RxJS v7 using `new Observable(subscriber)` that registers and unregisters a click handler.
Write a custom Observable<Chunk> in RxJS v7 driven by an async poll loop. Constraints: strict types, no any, surface errors via subscriber.error, tear down the loop on unsubscribe.
Build an Observable<User> in RxJS v7 from a Promise using from().
What's the v7 way to turn an async iterable into an Observable? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how `from(promise)` behaves in RxJS v7 on rejection, then show a typed example with retry.
Build an RxJS v7 Observable<string> from a Set<string> using from().
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that combines a Promise<Profile> with a stream of tick events. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, use from() for the promise.

Add a capability: convert this iterable into an Observable that logs each element via tap.

```ts
const rows: readonly { id: number }[] = [{ id: 1 }, { id: 2 }, { id: 3 }];
```
